questions.question: Which senator was the only Republican to support the Democratic resolution to force an end to U.S. military action in Iran without congressional approval?
questions.explanation: Rand Paul was the lone Republican to back the resolution, while John Fetterman was the only Democrat to oppose it. The vote marked the fourth time Senate Republicans blocked the measure.

questions.question: Why did House Republicans delay a planned procedural vote on renewing Section 702 of FISA?
options: Democrats filibustered the bill in the Senate
Their own members threatened to block it over privacy changes
The White House asked for a one-month delay
A court ruled the existing law unconstitutional
questions.explanation: The vote was delayed after a bipartisan group of lawmakers demanded privacy reforms, including a warrant requirement for searching Americans' communications. Republican leaders and intelligence officials argued those changes would make Section 702 harder to use.

questions.question: What did the divided federal appeals court do in the dispute over deportation flights carrying Venezuelan migrants to El Salvador?
options: It upheld Judge Boasberg's contempt investigation
It ordered the administration to return the migrants immediately
It shut down Boasberg's contempt investigation
It referred the matter directly to the Supreme Court
questions.explanation: The D.C. Circuit ruled 2-1 that Boasberg's contempt probe was an abuse of discretion and said his order was not clear enough to support criminal contempt. The decision halted, for now, the effort to determine why the flights went ahead.

questions.question: How much did Kevin Warsh's Senate ethics filing disclose in financial holdings?
questions.explanation: Warsh disclosed holdings worth well over $100 million. The filing included about $10 million in consulting fees and two fund stakes valued at more than $50 million each.

questions.question: What movie did Pete Hegseth draw from when he recited a fake prayer during a Pentagon prayer service?
questions.explanation: Hegseth read a made-up verse modeled on the line Samuel L. Jackson's character recites in Pulp Fiction. The Pentagon later insisted the prayer was obviously inspired by the film.

questions.question: Roughly how many Haitians would have Temporary Protected Status restored for three years under the bipartisan House bill?
questions.explanation: The bill would restore Temporary Protected Status for about 350,000 Haitians in the United States for three years. It would also reinstate work permits and deportation protections the administration had tried to end.
